S.FORM: Takaray a sowal o kananamay a somowal o mahoping hananay koninian a tananoman.
S.PHON: takaraj a so~uwaɾ o~u kananamaj a so~umo~uwaɾ o~u maħo~upiŋ ħananaj ko~uninian a tanano~uman.
S.FORM: Takaray a sowal o kananamay a somowal o mahoping hananay koninian a tananoman.
S.PHON: takaraj a so~uwaɾ o~u kananamaj a so~umo~uwaɾ o~u maħo~upiŋ ħananaj ko~uninian a tanano~uman.
